full_text:
Ju Shou 沮授
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ju Shou (沮授)was born in Guangping. Urged caution when attacking Cao Cao but was ignored and demoted. Ju Shou was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty and Yuan Shao. Ju Shou lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
